styles.dream: Professional luxury cosmetic product photography for a premium kids beauty brand LeoNes. Pastel sky blue (#C9E4F5) and baby pink (#FBD3DE) soft gradient background, crystal white highlights, dreamy soft studio lighting, tiny sparkles and delicate bubbles floating in the air, glossy reflective surfaces, Apple-level minimalism, Rhode-style premium presentation, photorealistic, high-end beauty campaign, no people
styles.ecom: Realistic commercial e-commerce product photography of a real manufacturable cosmetic product, shot like Rhode, Laneige and Summer Fridays product pages. Eye-level camera, 85mm lens look, pure seamless white studio background, large softbox lighting from upper front-left, gentle fill, one soft natural contact shadow, crisp focus, true-to-life materials and proportions, factory-producible design. Brand identity: transparent or frosted-clear packaging, pastel sky blue (#C9E4F5) cap or lid, minimalist white label with dark plum modern sans-serif text, the brand wordmark "LeoNes" printed cleanly and legibly. Premium, safe-looking, giftable, not babyish. Avoid completely: cartoon look, toy proportions, novelty caps, mascots, floating products, airborne sparkles, dreamy gradients, busy props, fantasy shapes, distorted geometry, gibberish text, misspelled words, watermark, 3D-render plastic look
styles.pinkset: Realistic commercial cosmetic product photography on a seamless baby pink (#FBD3DE) studio background, shot like a premium beauty brand campaign. Eye-level or slight top angle, soft even studio lighting, one soft natural shadow, crisp focus, true-to-life manufacturable packaging with frosted-clear body, pastel sky blue cap, minimal white label with a small clean "LeoNes" wordmark. Premium, clean, giftable. No cartoon look, no floating, no airborne glitter, no gibberish text, no extra props
styles.sticker: Single die-cut glossy vinyl sticker illustration, thick white sticker border, kawaii but premium and polished, soft 3D-render look with glossy highlights, pastel baby pink, sky blue and small gold accents, centered on a pure white background, no text, no letters, no shadow outside the sticker
styles.plush: Ultra-soft plush toy product photography, premium collectible plushie with short velvety fur, embroidered facial features, pastel baby pink and sky blue colors with small gold accents, soft dreamy studio light, pastel gradient backdrop, shallow depth of field, adorable but high-end designer toy quality like Jellycat, no text, no people
styles.graphic: Premium social media campaign background plate for a pastel kids beauty brand, photorealistic pastel pink and sky blue scene with glossy details, soft studio light, tiny sparkles, generous clean negative space reserved for a headline, elegant composition, TikTok-native aesthetic, absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no typography anywhere, no people
styles.overlay: Photographic light-effect overlay element on a pure solid black background for screen-blend compositing, high contrast, crisp, professional VFX asset quality, no text, no watermark
styles.parents: Calm, reassuring premium skincare brand photography for parents, soft natural daylight, clean white and cloud-grey setting with one gentle pastel pink accent, minimal composition, dermatologically credible and safe-looking like a premium sensitive-skin brand, realistic manufacturable cosmetic packaging with small clean "LeoNes" wordmark, no cartoon elements, no glitter, no text overlays, no people
